examples: The papers are not bereft of whimsy, but it is confined to footnotes and asides.
Usefulness might contribute to utility, but so does style, fashion, or even whimsy.
Beautiful young people are the whimsy of nature, but beautiful old people are true works of art.
Every time I step onto a Virgin Airplane, I get a sense of whimsy and adventure.
But for sheer whimsy, nothing matches Asahi's Super Dry Hall (Philippe Starck, 1989) in Asakusa district.
